sutta: [Music] the buddha said at such time monks as rajas are unrighteous or the ministers of rajas also are unrighteous when ministers are unrighteous brahmanas and householders also are unrighteous thus townsfolk and villagers are unrighteous this being so moon and sun go wrong in their courses this being so constellation and stars do likewise days and nights months and fortnights seasons and years are out of joint the winds blow wrong out of season thus the devas are annoyed this being so the sky deva bestows not sufficient rain rains not falling seasonably the crops ripen in wrong season monks erupt when crops ripen in the wrong season men who live on such crops are short-lived ill-favored weak and sickly but monks when rajas are righteous the ministers of rajas also are righteous when ministers are righteous brahmins and householders also are righteous thus townsfolk and villages are righteous this being so moon and sun go right in the courses this being so constellation and stars do likewise days and nights months and fortnights seasons and years go on the courses regularly winds blow regularly and in due season thus the devas are not annoyed and the sky deva bestows sufficient rain rains falling seasonably the crops ripen in due season monks when crops ripen in due season men who live on those crops are long-lived well-favored strong and free from sickness that's the end of the sutra so
commentary: this suta is saying that leaders are very important here is rajasthan rajas means kings in those times we had kings and nowadays he will be government leaders etc and because the actions of leaders influence those below them and in our religion is also the same the leaders of our religions are monks so if monks set a good example then our religion will do well but if monks had a bad example just like a leader then people are discouraged people are disappointed and they don't come to the temples etc and then our sasana our religion will suffer that's why it's very important for monks and government leaders etc to set a good example and the reason why people go on the wrong course is because of green hatred and delusion if we succumb to greed hatred and delusion then we do wrong things and because of our wrong actions the devas they are anointed and the divas are annoying they don't give rain when it's supposed to rain and we can compare this with another suta which i had read some time ago about the population of the earth being very great a long time ago and then the buddha said now it's people are very much less than before because of several reasons 1 is because of great hatred and delusion people fight and kill each other so the population decrease another 1 is the devastating because of the great hatred and delusion of human beings they don't give rain at the proper time and because of that there is feminine there's starvation so people the population of people decrease another 1 that they had read earlier was sometimes the devas they can let go refeers yakkas very fears demons that can kill human beings and it's only because human beings are walking the good path and agreed hatred and delusion is not so great that these higher devas they protect us they hold back these fears demons fears are cast but when we are too much then let them go and we will have to suffer [Music] so we come to another suta
